untranslatable_reason: Signal references 'noise measurement' which is not a standard allowed indicator. ATR_14 used as proxy for volatility/noise measurement, but the exact 'noise_measurement_basis' parameter from source is marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Thresholds 0.204 and 0.266 inferred from source text but lack explicit definition for trend-following vs mean-reverting strategy selection logic.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN's Efficiency Ratio concept requires a specific noise metric not in the allowed indicator set. Used ATR_14 as volatility/noise proxy. Low noise threshold set to 0.204 (lowest in source), high noise to 0.266 (greatest in source) based on inverse interpretation from original text. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal specifies conditional strategy selection (trend-following for low noise, mean-reverting for high noise). Exit conditions reversed regime entry to create regime-switching logic.
